projectDescription: A Prometheus exporter that exposes real-time Celery task and worker metrics for monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana.
keyFeatures: Real-time Celery task event monitoring via built-in Celery monitoring API
Tracks task lifecycle states: sent, received, started, succeeded, failed, rejected, revoked, retried
Worker health monitoring with heartbeat tracking and configurable timeouts
Queue length and consumer metrics for Redis and RabbitMQ
Deployable as Docker image, standalone binary, or PyPI package
Kubernetes Helm chart for easy cluster deployment
Grafana dashboards and Prometheus alerting rules via Celery-mixin
Configurable metric prefixes and static labels for multi-tenant environments
Health check endpoint at /health for liveness probes
publicApiSurface: --worker-timeout: Seconds before considering a worker offline
--purge-offline-worker-metrics: Seconds before removing offline worker label series
--generic-hostname-task-sent-metric: Use generic hostname for task-sent metric
--queues (-Q): Comma-separated list of queues to pre-populate
--default-queue-name: Default queue name when not present in task
--static-label: Add static key=value labels to all metrics
CE_* environment variable prefix for all CLI options
